patches_modified.name: Free in-app purchases
patches_modified.description: Skips purchase signature verification and forces billing to report success. Patches RunnerBillingSecurity.verifyPurchase to always return true, Purchase.isAcknowledged/getPurchaseState to return valid values, and the billing bridge callbacks.

patches_modified.name: Remove ads
patches_modified.description: Simulates the purchase of the 'climbnoads' IAP product so the game thinks you bought No Ads and stops showing ads naturally. Patches GPBilling_Purchase_GetState to return PURCHASED when called with 'climbnoads'.

patches_added.name: Disable Firebase services
patches_added.description: Adds the officially documented Firebase off-switches (`firebase_analytics_collection_deactivated`, `firebase_crashlytics_collection_enabled=false`, `firebase_performance_collection_deactivated`, `google_analytics_adid_collection_enabled=false`) so the Firebase Analytics, Crashlytics and Performance SDKs go dormant.

patches_added.name: Disable Firebase services
patches_added.description: Adds the officially documented Firebase off-switches (`firebase_analytics_collection_deactivated`, `firebase_crashlytics_collection_enabled=false`, `firebase_performance_collection_deactivated`, `google_analytics_adid_collection_enabled=false`) so the Firebase Analytics, Crashlytics and Performance SDKs go dormant.

patches_modified.name: Disable Infinite Upgrade Popup
patches_modified.description: Disables the "Want unlimited access? Get Sankaku Infinite!" upsell popup that periodically appears while browsing the app.
